description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that builds Clickable apps for three architectures (amd64, arm64, armhf) using the clickable/ci-20.04-$ARCH Docker image, with a build stage that runs clickable build --clean --arch $ARCH --accept-review-errors and stores the resulting app binary from build/$ARCH_TRIPLET/app as an artifact for 1 week. Define three jobs: build-amd64, build-arm64, and build-armhf, each extending the .build template and setting ARCH and ARCH_TRIPLET variables via anchors. Add a publish stage with a publish job that uses the clickable/ci-20.04-armhf image, depends on all three build jobs, runs clickable publish "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE", clickable publish --arch arm64, and clickable publish --arch amd64, and uploads all *.click files from the three architecture build directories as artifacts for 30 days. Configure the publish job to run only when a Git tag is present, and set runner tags based on the project namespace: ubports projects get the ubports tag, others get saas-linux-small-amd64. Include DOCKER_DRIVER and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY variables at the pipeline level.
